title: Sentrux Next Steps (frontmatter)
description: YAML frontmatter for actionable refactor prescriptions produced by the /sentrux-next-steps skill. The body of the markdown file is freeform prose rendered by SentruxNextStepsCard via react-markdown.

schema.description: Schema discriminator. Bump only on field removal/rename; additive changes do not need a bump.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the prescription was written.

generator.description: Model / agent identifier that produced the artifact (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'hand-seed-2026-05-24').

quality_signal.description: Sentrux composite quality score at generation time.

cycles.description: Cycle count reported by mcp__sentrux__dsm at generation time.

coverage_pct.description: Test coverage percentage from mcp__sentrux__test_gaps at generation time.

value_annotations.description: Count of @ai:business-value annotations consulted when ranking. 0 when the AI annotations endpoint returned empty.

smell_annotations.description: Count of @ai:smell annotations consulted when ranking. 0 when the AI annotations endpoint returned empty.
